role_title: Direct Funds Product Manager - Assistant Vice President

location.office_time_required: 3 days a week in office, 2 days remote

secondary_archetype: Fund Servicing / Product Operations — alternative investments lifecycle management

seniority.level: AVP (mid-level IC, likely equivalent to Senior Associate or Junior VP in financial services)
level_signals: Described as a newly created individual contributor role
Fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment signal consistent with early-to-mid career IC

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Bachelor's degree and/or master's degree in a relevant field.
2–4 years of experience in product management, fund servicing, or a related role within alternative investments, asset management, or wealth management.
Strong understanding of the lifecycle and operational processes of alternative investment funds.
Structured approach to prioritizing and delivering required tasks and ability to develop scalable processes.
Excellent organizational skills and the ability to handle multiple tasks and prioritize assignments.
Strong oral and written communication skills – proficiency in English required; other languages a plus.
Strong analytical and stakeholder management skills.
Positive attitude, proactive approach, and desire to work in a fast-moving, entrepreneurial environment.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience with Luxembourg fund structures and evergreen funds preferred.
Strong oral and written communication skills – proficiency in English required; other languages a plus.

scope.surface: Post-launch fund servicing, lifecycle management, and governance for Luxembourg-domiciled AIFs (primarily Evergreen private markets funds) across Europe
scope.business_model: B2B — fund servicing and product management platform for Asset and Wealth management clients
primary_metrics_inferred: Timely completion of fund servicing activities
Accuracy of due diligence and RFP responses
Regulatory compliance and approval timelines for new share classes/amendments
core_responsibilities: Serve as the primary point of contact for post-launch product management of Lux funds, including Evergreen private markets funds.

Coordinate the launch of new share classes as well as oversee any other amendments to offering materials, including arranging for any associated regulatory approvals and managing investor consent processes, as applicable.
Coordinate the production and compliance sign-off of key fund level marketing materials and ensure the timely dissemination of information to all relevant stakeholders
Respond to due diligence (DD) questionnaires on funds serviced and/or managed by iCapital and oversee fund level RFPs, coordinating across functions for a timely delivery of accurate responses.
Handle AML/KYC with key service providers pertaining to both upstream and downstream processes relating to the funds serviced/managed by iCapital
Liaise with the International Tax team to respond to jurisdiction-specific tax queries and arrange for appropriate registrations in offshore jurisdictions.
Handle ad hoc client requests relating to fund servicing, life cycle management and fund governance.
Support the administration and governance of recurring fund servicing activities, ensuring timely and accurate completion.
Collaborate with internal teams (Legal, Compliance, Tax, Client Success) and external providers (Administrators, Fund Sponsors, auditors) to deliver seamless fund servicing.

green_flags: Newly created role offering broad exposure across iCapital's alternatives business in Europe
Clear scope and responsibilities defined in detail
Fast-growing team with international remit (Luxembourg-domiciled funds)
Hybrid schedule explicitly described (3 days office, 2 days remote)
red_flags: Office location not specified in the JD body — unclear which city/country this role is based in, despite European/Luxembourg focus
Visa sponsorship and work authorization not addressed
Role is titled 'Product Manager' but is heavily fund operations/servicing in nature — may mislead traditional PM candidates
2–4 years experience required but title is AVP (Assistant Vice President), which varies widely in seniority across firms — potential leveling ambiguity

Archetype classified as Generalist PM with a secondary note reflecting the fund servicing focus.
